push_nudge_message: Get notified when your generations finish
profile_change_password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.

error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error_unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

frames_frame_display_error: Could not display this video frame

frames_selected_limit: You can select up to 50 frames.
frames_no_selection: Select at least one frame to extract.

offline_page_description: Check your internet connection and try again.

pwa_install_ios_step2: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"

age_gate_error_checkbox: You must confirm you are 18 years or older to continue.

age_gate_error_underage: You must be 18 or older to use this service.
age_verify_permanent_warning: This cannot be changed later. Your date of birth is stored permanently and is write-once.
sessions_empty: No active sessions. Start one below.
sessions_start_hint: Takes ~30–90 s to provision. Billed by the hour.
session_already_exists: You already have an active session for this model
create_needs_session: This model requires an active GPU session to generate.
error_no_active_gpu_session: No active GPU session. Start one on the Sessions page.
create_session_paused_note: Session is paused. Manage it in Sessions.
create_session_cost_hint: Billed by the hour. Takes ~30–90 s to start.
credit_banner_warning: Running low on credits — this GPU session stops in {time}. Top up to keep generating.
credit_banner_critical: Critical: this GPU session is almost out of credits! Stops in {time}. Top up now.
credit_banner_stopping: Out of credits — stopping this session…
session_toast_stopped_no_credits: Session stopped due to insufficient credits. Top up to continue.
balance_debt_label: You owe {n} tokens — top up to continue
error_insufficient_balance: Insufficient balance. Top up to continue.
credit_banner_warning_sr: Running low on credits — this GPU session will stop soon. Top up to keep generating.
credit_banner_critical_sr: Critical: this GPU session is almost out of credits and will stop soon. Top up now.
billing_topup_amount_hint: Enter a whole dollar amount between {min} and {max}.
billing_topup_amount_integer: Amount must be a whole number.
billing_topup_provider_disabled: This payment method was just disabled — refreshing available methods.
billing_currency_picker_hint: Optionally choose a currency for the hosted payment page.
billing_topup_recovery_hint: Retry uses the exact previous request and does not create a new amount selection.
billing_topup_still_processing: This checkout request is still processing.
billing_topup_currency_suppressed: That currency is no longer available. Choose another currency or choose on the payment page.
billing_topup_credited: Top-up credited. Your balance has been updated.
billing_return_success: Payment submitted; your balance will update when confirmed.
billing_return_success_generic: Payment submitted; confirmation may take a moment.
billing_return_cancelled: Checkout cancelled; no payment was confirmed.
admin_currency_catalog_workflow: Edit currencies in the NowPayments dashboard, refresh here, then verify the list.
admin_currency_refresh_failed: Refresh failed, showing last known list.
admin_currency_load_error: Failed to load the currency catalog.
admin_currency_empty: No payment currencies are currently in the catalog.
admin_currency_suppress_confirmation: Suppress {ticker}? It will be hidden from the Apex picker and pinned checkout. Catalog refreshes will not remove this suppression.
admin_currency_suppression_explanation: Suppression hides a ticker from the Apex picker and pinned checkout. Provider availability and Apex suppression are separate, and refresh never clears suppression.
admin_currency_suppression_error: Could not update Apex picker status. The latest catalog has been requested.
error_idempotency_conflict: Request already in progress. Please wait a moment and try again.
error_generation_start_failed: Failed to start generation. Please try again.
error_generation_status_unknown: Generation status unknown. Check Jobs page.
error_source_image_required: Please select or upload a source image first.
error_custom_size_incomplete: Both width and height are required for custom size.
error_unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
job_toast_moderated: Content was moderated by the AI provider.
pwa_update_current: Your app is up to date.
pwa_update_applying: A new version is available and is being applied…
pwa_update_offline: You're offline. Connect to the internet and try again.
pwa_update_check_failed: Couldn't check for an app update. Please try again.
pwa_update_ready_title: A new version of the app is ready.
pwa_update_dirty_title: A new version is ready. Updating may discard unsaved changes.
pwa_update_dirty_description: Save or submit your work first, or update anyway.
